ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash, online) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is a return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES inventory ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "sku" INTEGER /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required for the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock level reaches the reorder point */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the SKU */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase from the supplier */,
  "last_purchase_price" REAL /* Last purchase price of the SKU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_purchase_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last purchase */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discount is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)
